zh.Speldhurst, Kent, England: 英國肯特斯培爾度爾斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Waller於大約1335年出生在英國肯特藍爾爾斯特時，他的父親Thomas Waller II34歲，母親Catherine de Clifford27歲。他於1364年與Christina de Chalfunte在英國肯特斯培爾度爾斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1391年在英國肯特斯培爾度爾斯特享年58歲。

zh-hans.Speldhurst, Kent, England: 英国肯特斯培爾度爾斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Waller于大约1335年出生在英国肯特藍爾爾斯特时，他的父亲Thomas Waller II34岁，母亲Catherine de Clifford27岁。他于1364年与Christina de Chalfunte在英国肯特斯培爾度爾斯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1391年在英国肯特斯培爾度爾斯特享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Waller
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English waler, waliere, walour, waller ‘builder of walls, mason’.
English: in Sussex, perhaps a topographic name for someone who lived by a prominent wall.

English: topographic name for someone who lived by a spring, stream, or man-made well, from Middle English waller, a derivative of Middle English walle, Old English wælle, wælle. It is a West Midlands dialect form of Weller .

variants.name: Weller
meanings: English (Surrey, Sussex, and Kent): topographic name for someone who lived by a spring, stream, or man-made well, from Middle English weller, willer, an agent derivative of Middle English welle (in southern England) and wille (in south western England), from Old English wella, well(e), wiella, wielle, willa, wyll(a), wylle. This type of name, a topographic term + -er, is particularly typical of Sussex and its neigbouring counties.
English: occupational name for someone who casts metal or who boils salt, from Middle English weller, willer, a derivative with -er of Old English wellan, wiellan ‘to boil’. Compare 5 below.
North German: variant of   Welle  , cognate with 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Waller was born about 1335, in Lamberhurst, Kent, England, his father, Thomas Waller II, was 34 and his mother, Catherine de Clifford, was 27. He married Christina de Chalfunte in 1364, in Speldhurst, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 1391, in Speldhurst, Kent, England, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Waller est né environ 1335, à Lamberhurst, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Waller II, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Catherine de Clifford, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Christina de Chalfunte en 1364, à Speldhurst, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 1391, à Speldhurst, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Waller um 1335 in Lamberhurst, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Waller II 34 und seine Mutter Catherine de Clifford 27. Er hat 1364 in Speldhurst, Kent, England Christina de Chalfunte geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 1391 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Speldhurst, Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Waller è nato il circa 1335 nel Lamberhurst, Kent, England, il suo padre, Thomas Waller II, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Catherine de Clifford, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Christina de Chalfunte nel 1364, nel Speldhurst, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1391, nel Speldhurst, Kent, England, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Wallerが約1335年にイギリスケントランバーハルストで生まれた時，父Thomas Waller IIは34歳，母Catherine de Cliffordは27歳であった。1364年にイギリスケントスペルドハルストでChristina de Chalfunteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約1391年にイギリスケントスペルドハルストで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Waller(이)가 대략 1335년 영국 켄트 램후르스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Waller II(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine de Clifford(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1364년 영국 켄트 스펠드후르스트에서 Christina de Chalfunte(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1391년 영국 켄트 스펠드후르스트에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Waller nasceu aproximadamente 1335, em Lamberhurst, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Waller II, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Catherine de Clifford, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Christina de Chalfunte em 1364, em Speldhurst, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1391, em Speldhurst, Kent, Inglaterra, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Waller родился около 1335 г. в местности лэмбирурст, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Waller II было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine de Clifford, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Christina de Chalfunte в 1364 г. в местности спелдхурст, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 1391 г. в местности спелдхурст, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.

Se casó con Christina de Chalfunte en 1364, en Speldhurst, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1391, en Speldhurst, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años.
